notes: Vertical 800x1198 product photo. Front-on enough that Gemini can read the spoke pattern. ECS/Bimmerworld block scraping for direct ARC-8 imagery; this is the closest representative I could find that fetches with CORS=*.

notes: Vertical 800x1200 chrome-tips close-up — Gemini can read material + tip shape. Previous image was the real IND Distribution product shot but Gemini couldn't read tip shape from the partially-occluded angle.

imageAttribution: Pexels (chrome twin exhaust closeup, detailed view of a modern vehicle's tips)
notes: Wide 800x533 closeup of twin chrome tips. Replaces the previous wider E30 rear shot that Gemini misread as a car (not a tip).
